## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss fwd.digital's growth, hiring needs, and Remote's new recruiting solution.](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital raised $12M Series A, hit $5M ARR, growing to 50 FTEs by H1](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Remote launching full recruiting solution on Feb 17th, including AI sourcing/matching](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [fwd.digital evaluating HR platforms (Remote, Deel, Rippling) for scaling needs](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Time-sensitive decision needed on HR platform to support rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Growth and Funding

  - [Raised $12M Series A with Madrona leading](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Hit $5M ARR last week, doubled year-over-year](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Currently at 25 employees, aiming for 50 FTEs by end of H1](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Planning to hire very senior engineers and convert key roles to W2](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Current Hiring Process and Pain Points

  - [Using workable ATS, but facing limitations (e.g., no API for video interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Custom-built AI-driven vetting process:](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [Written questions (70% AI-vetted)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [7 video questions (5 min each, 70% AI-vetted)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Reduces 2000 applicants to 20-30 for live interviews](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Challenges with fragmented tools:](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Equipment management (Hoppy)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Background checks (Checker)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Onboarding tasks tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Benefits administration for W2 employees](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

### Remote's New Recruiting Solution

  - [Launching full suite on Feb 17th, major marketing push on March 10th](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [Enhanced job board (2M monthly visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [AI sourcing and matching](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [Talent insights (market data on hiring locations)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [AI interviews](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [Mini-ATS with one-click hire functionality](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Database of 800M global profiles for sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Pricing based on usage tiers ($200-$2000/month), unlimited users](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### Next Steps for fwd.digital

  - [Urgent decision needed on HR platform (Remote, Deel, or Rippling)](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Establish new C Corp and move everyone from LLC to new entity](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Implement comprehensive benefits package for W2 employees](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Streamline onboarding and equipment management processes](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to connect Gillian with fwd.digital's Chief of Staff](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call later today to discuss Remote's full capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Evaluate Remote's solution against Deel and Rippling offers](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Make decision on HR platform within next 1-2 days to support rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/xhF9ZjrjXHyovPz_8XENiA8yPKscwFty?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
